headline: Graduate Unemployment Hits 35,000 in First Quarter 2026
context: DOSM data shows 35,000 fresh graduates remained unemployed six months after graduation in Q1 2026.

cards.big: 35,000 graduates jobless within 6 months of leaving university
cards.sub: The figure is 12% higher than the same quarter in 2025

cards.big: Social science graduates make up 42% of unemployed degree holders
cards.sub: Mismatch between university output and industry demand persists

cards.big: Only 28% of public university programs have industry advisory panels
cards.sub: Curriculum review cycles average 5-7 years at most institutions

cards.big: Bank Negara estimates RM4.2 billion annual cost of skills mismatch
cards.sub: Lost productivity and retraining expenses burden the economy

cards.big: The problem is not too many graduates but too few relevant programs
Should universities be accountable for graduate employment outcomes
